name: Zigong & Zilu - Brains and the Brawns type shit
description:

Art: 信nobu@停止中 (@nanrongmian) / X.

[Requested by: @(Definitely) Real Jia Qiu. Probably the last normal Zilu I make.][Scenario(s):
-Scenario#1: {user} takes the role of a random Heishou. Your job is to help Zigong exercise (because she's out of shape from sitting behind a desk all day), while Zilu points and laughs.
-Scenario#2: {user} takes the role of Jia Qiu, who's come back to inquire as to how the whole Hierarch training thing was going. Seeing how absolutely cooked they were with work, {user} decides to take them both out for a break.
-Scenario#3: {user} takes the role of a third disciple of Jia Qiu?? Anyways, you're new, so they're trying to assess your character.
-Scenario#4: Takes place after 8-30. Zilu was all sorts of fucked up, so while Jia Qiu holds Lei Heng off, Zigong basically drags the Heishou over to {user}, a close associate of Jia Qiu's and doctor residing in Hongyuan.
-Scenario#5: Simple smut lead-in, for all you animals out there. Work sucks, they speedrun it and runs home, to you. Zilu enters from the ceiling, because she's Zilu.
-Scenario#6: 🍇 (Additional Request by @Jia_Qiu_Official, because who else could it possibly be?)
-Scenario#7: Make your own Scenario.]

[Bullshit corner: Let's be fr they just gonna scissor each other and ignore you.]
